content.en:
Ye Tian chatted with the Lord of Darkness for a while before choosing to leave.

After leaving, Ye Tian pondered which way to break through.

"The resources suitable for me to break through are very rare, according to what the Lord of Darkness said, there were still some of those resources in the primeval era, and now there are not many, even the Dark Sea can't make up the number of ordinary blood transformation realms to complete bone transformation, let alone let me break through! I'm afraid I have to give me the special resources of the entire territorial sea boundary gap, almost enough to make up a sufficient number." "

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, he will either make it up in the Hunhe Realm, or he will give up this method.

"It's more difficult to get it together in the Hunhe River Realm, but now it's only a small part of it, and the resources are not much, and the top hegemon-level forces won't take it out casually, and it's extremely difficult to get it together. Unless you wait for the other top boundary cracks to open, then break into them and look for them slowly, you will have any hope of getting together!"

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and felt that it was better to create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique first, and this hope was a little greater.

It just so happened that he was still in the primeval realm, so he tried to create a supreme primeval bone technique, and he might be able to succeed.

"Then try it!"

Ye Tian decided.

In order to be able to create the supreme primeval bone technique, he first comprehended the primeval gold inscriptions he had obtained in Xishan.

So, his Blood Fish Heavenly Ancestor returned to Xishan and began to comprehend the Ancient Golden Script, and with the copy body of the Ancient Golden Realm, he soon thoroughly comprehended the Ancient Golden Script.

Having comprehended more and more primeval inscriptions, he began to create the Supreme primeval bone technique, and experimented with a replica body.

The experiment failed again and again, and the replica body was scrapped, but it also made Ye Tian's understanding of the Ancient Bone Technique more and more profound, and he became more and more confident in creating the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique.

Time flies, and a long time passes.

At this time, it was not far from the closure of the Swire Golden World.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian successfully created a Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, but it also made him almost exhaust his own heritage, and then if he wanted to create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, he had to find more Ancient Golden Texts, otherwise the number of Ancient Golden Scripts would not be enough, and the foundation would be insufficient!

After this Supreme Ancient Bone Technique was created by Ye Tian, he fused into one of the last five immeasurable bones, allowing one of the immeasurable bones to complete the bone transformation.

Rumble!!!!!

This immeasurable bone bone change has a great impact on the body, and the physical body has directly become stronger.

"I didn't expect that the Creation Supreme Ancient Bone Technique would be integrated into the Infinite Bone, and the transformation would be so huge!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

It's a pity that he won't be able to create a second Supreme Ancient Bone Technique in a short period of time.

It's been some time, and the Swire Golden World is going to close.

Airplanes!!!!

A Blood Mutant Realm creature has been removed from the primeval realm.

......

Swire Gold Outside.

A venerable bone transformation realm creature was waiting here, and when they saw that the blood transformation realm creatures were moved out, they all surged with strength, ready to wait for Ye Tian to come out, and then kill Ye Tian.

"It's coming out!"

The Lord of the Ruins said.

However, when all the Blood Transformation Realm creatures came out, they didn't see Ye Tian.

Suddenly, they were all dumbfounded.

Because at the moment when he was about to be removed, Ye Tian directly annihilated his copy body, so he was not moved out.

Taixuanhai.

Ye Tian smiled slightly and said, "I'm afraid that the group of bone transformation realms in the Hunhe Boundary Gap are still very confused, I don't know why they didn't see me!"

Next, he would collect as many ancient gold inscriptions as he could.

There is not much hope in the territorial sea boundary rift, so it must be started from the Hunhe boundary rift, in addition to Xishan, other top overlord-level forces must have more ancient gold inscriptions, so they can also start from them.

"If you want to obtain the primeval gold of other top overlord-level forces, you can only continue to open the vest!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Anyway, he has a lot of replicator bodies now, so there is no problem with opening a few more vests, and when these vests have become the high-level of the top hegemon-level forces, for him, where is there any crisis!

"Let's go into the ruins cave next!"

Ye Tian decided.

Cave of the Ruins.

Ye Tian changed his identity this time and joined the Chaos Cave as an ancient Ahuizotl.

This replica body is called Water Ji Tianzu.

Of course, the Mixed Ruins Cave is not a Blood Transformation Realm, so he showed the strength of the Eight Blood Transformation Realms of the Breaking Realm, joined the Mixed Ruins Cave, and then pretended to be a fluke in the Mixed Ruins Cave to practice an ancient technique and became an ancient-level genius.

In this way, he was also taken seriously in the Chaos Cave.

After becoming an primeval-level genius, he was not subject to any restrictions, and he could comprehend many primeval golden inscriptions in the Chaos Cave.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian comprehended these ancient golden texts as soon as possible.

With his comprehension, the speed of comprehending the Taikoo Jinwen was naturally very fast, and one after another Taikoo Jinwen was thoroughly understood by him.

In addition to the Chaos Cave and Xishan, he also used a replica body to blend into another top overlord-level force-True Dragon Cave Heaven, this top overlord-level force is a little special, and only collects blood transformation realm creatures containing the blood bloodline of the dragon clan.

Therefore, his brand-new replica body was an ancient dragon snake named Long Yan Heavenly Ancestor.

After blending into the True Dragon Cave Heaven, he slowly became an ancient genius, gained the attention of the True Dragon Cave Heaven, and could also refer to the Ancient Golden Texts of the True Dragon Cave Heaven, although the Ancient Golden Texts have overlapping parts, but there are also many new Ancient Golden Texts.

Bloodfish, Shui Ji, Dragon Flame.

This is Ye Tian's three major replication body identities now, Ye Tian will not move for the time being, and he will not continue to increase the replication body, otherwise the replication body is not enough, after all, he usually has to use the replication body for experiments, as well as guarding Taixuanhai and looking for other opportunities, he is usually very busy.

"The Ancient Golden Text has comprehended a lot, and it is possible to continue to create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, but it will take at least a long time, unless you can enter the Ancient Golden Realm again!" Ye Tian muttered.

In addition, he was also trying to find resources to help him complete his bone transformation, and how much he could collect, after all, he couldn't completely rely on the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique!

Both methods had to be tried, otherwise it would take too long for him to become a bone transformation realm.

this day.

Good news came.

Another top rift is about to open.
